title: Dimension Crystals
description: Dimension Crystals is a mod that adds crystals to quickly move between dimensions
body:
💎 Dimension Crystals

Dimension Crystals is a mod that adds crystals to quickly move between dimensions

📚 Manual

To activate the crystal, just click on the air block!

💬 Supported languages

  • English (US)
  • Русский
  • 繁體中文（台灣）

💾 Supported mod loaders

  • Forge

🧬 Recipes

You can use any sapling for crafting
